tool.name: RGI: Install WildCARD database
tool.description: download and index a WildCARD release for use with RGI tools

param.name: card_db
param.label: CARD database
param.help: Select the installed CARD release that matches this WildCARD data. The rgi wildcard_annotation step requires the corresponding card.json.

validator.message: No CARD databases are installed. Run 'RGI: Install CARD database' first.

param.name: wildcard_url
param.label: WildCARD download URL
param.help: URL to the WildCARD data archive (card-variants.tar.bz2). The default fetches the latest release.

param.name: wildcard_version
param.label: WildCARD version string
param.help: Version of the WildCARD data, e.g. 4.0.0. Check the WildCARD release page for the version that corresponds to the archive you are downloading.

validator.message: Version must be digits and dots only, e.g. 4.0.0

tool.help:
**RGI: Install WildCARD database**
Downloads a WildCARD (predicted AMR gene variant) release, extracts the variant sequences, and runs ``rgi wildcard_annotation`` to generate the annotation FASTAs and index file required by the RGI tools. The database is registered in the ``rgi_wildcard`` data table so users can select it from the WildCARD database dropdown in **RGI main** and **RGI bwt**.
-----
**Prerequisites**
A CARD database must already be installed (run **RGI: Install CARD database** first). Select the matching CARD release — ``rgi wildcard_annotation`` needs the corresponding ``card.json`` to annotate variant sequences.
-----
**WildCARD version**
The version string (e.g. ``4.0.0``) is not embedded in the download archive. Check the WildCARD release notes at https://card.mcmaster.ca/download to find the version number for the archive you are installing.
-----
**After installation**
The WildCARD entry will appear in the WildCARD database dropdown in **RGI main** and **RGI bwt**. Both the homolog-models-only FASTA and the all-models FASTA are stored alongside the index file.
